Creature Battle 3v3 Simulator v1

Pick both teams, set levels, allocate manual stats, then resolve planned 3v3 rounds with the shared damage core. Combos/status/passives are intentionally scaffolded, not implemented.

Pre-Battle Setup

Player Team

Enemy Team

Plan Round

Round Planner

Choose one action per living creature, then resolve the round. Actions resolve by Speed. Defend applies before resolution and lasts for that round.

Player Commands

Enemy Commands

Battle Log

Export

Exports the current battle state, including team setup, resolved stats, HP/MP, allocation, and event log.
